body:
`NetCDFOutputwriter` has a bug for Immersed curvilinear grids, in practice for an immersed boundary the default 
`native_dimensions_for_netcdf_output` is called instead of the one for curvilinear grids.

This PR should address the issue. 
Also it seems to not be tested so I ll add a test

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Bug in NetCDF output for curvilinear immersed grids
